requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire-Safety and Local Installation Review
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全与当地安装审查
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全與當地安裝審查

summary.en: Montenegro projects for fixed battery energy storage usually require coordination with the fire inspectorate, building authority, occupational-safety inspector, insurer, and project owner in addition to product-level ISME-aligned electrical evidence. Fire acceptance is commonly managed through site design package, detection and suppression strategy, ventilation and thermal-runaway control, emergency shutdown, separation distances, and commissioning files rather than a single national BESS-wide technical certificate.
summary.zh: 黑山固定式储能项目通常除了面向 ISME 的产品级证据外，还需要与消防检查部门、建筑局、职业安全监督、保险方和项目业主协调。消防验收通常通过场站设计包、探测与灭火策略、通风和热失控控制、紧急停机、间距及调试资料来管理，而非单一全国统一的整体 BESS 认证证书。
summary.zht: 黑山固定式儲能項目通常除了面向 ISME 的產品級證據外，還需要與消防檢查部門、建築局、職業安全監督、保險方和項目業主協調。消防驗收通常透過場站設計包、探測與滅火策略、通風和熱失控控制、緊急停機、間距及調試資料來管理，而非單一全國統一的整體 BESS 認證證書。

standards_or_laws: Montenegro fire and rescue regulation framework
Municipality-level fire-safety inspection process in the project region

summary.en: Chinese projects commonly use GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 36558 for stationary energy-storage fire and system-level controls. These materials help engineering comparison, but they are not a substitute for Montenegro fire-inspection, building-permit, and site acceptance paths.
summary.zh: 中国通常使用 GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023 和 GB/T 36558 处理固定式储能的消防与系统控制问题，这些材料可用于工程比较，但不能替代黑山的消防检查、建筑许可和现场验收程序。
summary.zht: 中國通常使用 GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023 和 GB/T 36558 處理固定式儲能的消防與系統控制問題，這些資料可用於工程比較，但不能替代黑山的消防檢查、建築許可和現場驗收程序。

gap.en: Prepare a site-specific fire file covering enclosure layout, cell chemistry, thermal runaway mitigation, fire and gas risk analysis, spacing, access routes, emergency shutdown sequence, water-runoff or contamination control where relevant, commissioning acceptance tests, and Montenegro-language emergency procedures for operators and local authorities.
gap.zh: 应准备项目级消防资料包，包括柜体布置、 电芯化学体系、热失控缓解、消防与气体风险分析、间距、通道、紧急停机流程、适用时的消防废水外排或污染控制、调试验收测试，以及面向黑山本地的应急操作和消防流程文件。
gap.zht: 應準備項目級消防資料包，包括櫃體佈置、電芯化學體系、熱失控緩解、消防與氣體風險分析、間距、通道、緊急停機流程、適用時的消防廢水外溢或污染控制、調試驗收測試，以及面向黑山本地的應急操作和消防流程文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where fire authority, municipality, occupational safety, insurer, or local fire inspection applies; no confirmed blanket national whole-unit BESS fire certificate is stated here
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, local fire review, and procurement requirements

source.publisher: Government of Montenegro, civil-protection inspection and fire authority

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Product safety evidence is not enough to complete Montenegro fire review. Treat fire design, installation acceptance, and operator procedures as project-specific approval items managed by the site process.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 产品安全证据本身不足以完成黑山消防审查。应将消防设计、安装验收和运营程序作为项目特定批准事项，由现场流程单独管理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 產品安全證據本身不足以完成黑山消防審查。應將消防設計、安裝驗收與營運程序作為項目特定的批准項目，由現場流程單獨管理。
